'''âs-w-v''' ('''sawavasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mythologise|mythologise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mythologise|mythologise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-w-v
|-
! Lemma
| sawavasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawavithi|sawavithi]] || [[word:sawaviji|sawaviji]] || [[word:sawavishi|sawavishi]] || [[word:sawavi|sawavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawavuthuth|sawavuthuth]] || [[word:sawavujuj|sawavujuj]] || [[word:sawavushush|sawavushush]] || [[word:sawav|sawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawavuthu|sawavuthu]] || [[word:sawavuju|sawavuju]] || [[word:sawavushu|sawavushu]] || [[word:sawavu|sawavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawavufuth|sawavufuth]] || [[word:sawavufuj|sawavufuj]] || [[word:sawavufush|sawavufush]] || [[word:sawavuf|sawavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawavethe|sawavethe]] || [[word:sawaveje|sawaveje]] || [[word:sawaveshe|sawaveshe]] || [[word:sawave|sawave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawavothoth|sawavothoth]] || [[word:sawavojoj|sawavojoj]] || [[word:sawavoshosh|sawavoshosh]] || [[word:sawav|sawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawavotho|sawavotho]] || [[word:sawavojo|sawavojo]] || [[word:sawavosho|sawavosho]] || [[word:sawavo|sawavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawavofoth|sawavofoth]] || [[word:sawavofoj|sawavofoj]] || [[word:sawavofosh|sawavofosh]] || [[word:sawavof|sawavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawavĂŠthĂŠ|sawavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sawavĂŠjĂŠ|sawavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sawavĂŠshĂŠ|sawavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sawavĂŠ|sawavĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawavathath|sawavathath]] || [[word:sawavajaj|sawavajaj]] || [[word:sawavashash|sawavashash]] || [[word:sawav|sawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawavatha|sawavatha]] || [[word:sawavaja|sawavaja]] || [[word:sawavasha|sawavasha]] || [[word:sawava|sawava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawavafath|sawavafath]] || [[word:sawavafaj|sawavafaj]] || [[word:sawavafash|sawavafash]] || [[word:sawavaf|sawavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sawavasha|sawavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosawavasha|gosawavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisawavasha|gokisawavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sawavnĂŒsha|sawavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosawavnknĂŒsha|gosawavnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisawavnĂŒsha|gokisawavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sawavshĂ«sha|sawavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosawavnkshĂ«sha|gosawavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisawavshĂ«sha|gokisawavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawavrosha|sawavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawavnkrosha|gosawavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawavrosha|gokisawavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sawavmusha|sawavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawavnkmusha|gosawavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawavmusha|gokisawavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sawavsherasha|sawavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosawavnksherasha|gosawavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisawavsherasha|gokisawavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sawavngasha|sawavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosawavnkngasha|gosawavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisawavngasha|gokisawavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sawavyasha|sawavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosawavnkyasha|gosawavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisawavyasha|gokisawavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sawavyamasha|sawavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosawavnkyamasha|gosawavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisawavyamasha|gokisawavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawavnĂŒshĂ«sha|sawavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawavnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosawavnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawavnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisawavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawavnĂŒrosha|sawavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawavnknĂŒrosha|gosawavnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawavnĂŒrosha|gokisawavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawavnĂŒmusha|sawavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawavnknĂŒmusha|gosawavnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawavnĂŒmusha|gokisawavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawavshĂ«nĂŒsha|sawavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosawavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawavshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisawavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawavshĂ«rosha|sawavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawavnkshĂ«rosha|gosawavnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawavshĂ«rosha|gokisawavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawavshĂ«musha|sawavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawavnkshĂ«musha|gosawavnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawavshĂ«musha|gokisawavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawavronĂŒsha|sawavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawavnkronĂŒsha|gosawavnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawavronĂŒsha|gokisawavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawavroshĂ«sha|sawavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawavnkroshĂ«sha|gosawavnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawavroshĂ«sha|gokisawavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawavromusha|sawavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawavnkromusha|gosawavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawavromusha|gokisawavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawavmunĂŒsha|sawavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawavnkmunĂŒsha|gosawavnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawavmunĂŒsha|gokisawavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawavmushĂ«sha|sawavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawavnkmushĂ«sha|gosawavnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawavmushĂ«sha|gokisawavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawavmurosha|sawavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawavnkmurosha|gosawavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawavmurosha|gokisawavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sawav|sawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠv|sĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosawav|hosawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠwĂŠv|hosĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosawav|hohosawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠwĂŠv|hohosĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsawav|nĂŒsawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠwĂŠv|nĂŒsĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsawav|nĂŒnĂŒsawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠwĂŠv|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsawav|nĂŻsawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠwĂŠv|nĂŻsĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsawav|nĂŻnĂŻsawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠwĂŠv|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusawav|lusawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠwĂŠv|lusĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusawav|lulusawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠwĂŠv|lulusĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisawav|lisawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠwĂŠv|lisĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisawav|lilisawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠwĂŠv|lilisĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosawav|kosawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠwĂŠv|kosĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosawav|kokosawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠwĂŠv|kokosĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesawav|kesawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠwĂŠv|kesĂŠwĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesawav|kekesawav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠwĂŠv|kekesĂŠwĂŠv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
